issues.detail: Skill lacks runnable code or concrete procedures, making it non-actionable.
Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, limiting its completeness.

scenarios.name: Confirm whether 4-story V-B R-2 apartments with NFPA 13 is permitted
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives vague guidance with no story/height numbers; treatment states R-2 + V-B, the 3/40 without and 4/60 with NFPA 13 limits, the +1 story / +20 ft rule, and the single-increase caveat.

scenarios.name: Egress validation for an A-2 + R-2 mixed-use building
scenarios.rationale: Baseline lists generic egress concerns without occupancy codes; treatment classifies A-2 and R-2, references Table 508.4 separation, applies the 200 SF/7 SF occupant-load factors, and cites the 125 ft R-2 travel distance and 2-doorway rule for units > 500 SF.
